candidates.title: Sample ready-for-review Gree GMV diagnostic candidate
candidates.meaning: Sample staging guidance for review workflow only. Replace with exact evidence-backed meaning before production promotion.

source.manualTitle: Sample placeholder manual title - not runtime evidence
source.notes: ReadyForReview sample only. Reviewer must replace placeholder source metadata with exact manual evidence before approval.
limitations: Use as a staging review example only.
Do not promote until exact manual evidence and installed equipment applicability are verified.

likelyCauses: Sample likely cause pending source review.
Sample controller-reported condition requiring exact manual interpretation before production use.

diagnosticSteps.title: Confirm sample equipment identity
diagnosticSteps.instruction: Record manufacturer, GMV series, installed model, serial plate data, controller, and displayed code for review.
diagnosticSteps.expectedResult: The reviewer can confirm the sample candidate applies to the intended equipment family before approval.
diagnosticSteps.ifFailedAction: Keep the candidate in staging and request exact equipment information.

diagnosticSteps.title: Check source evidence completeness
diagnosticSteps.instruction: Confirm whether the exact manual title, page, and applicable model family are available for review.
diagnosticSteps.expectedResult: Manual evidence is either complete enough for approval or the candidate remains in staging.
diagnosticSteps.ifFailedAction: Keep the candidate as ReadyForReview or NeedsManualCheck until evidence is complete.

requiredMeasurements.name: Displayed code
requiredMeasurements.description: Controller-displayed diagnostic code recorded for review traceability.

requiredMeasurements.name: Installed model identification
requiredMeasurements.description: Model and serial plate data recorded before applicability review.

safetyNotes: Electrical, compressor, inverter, refrigerant, and protection checks must be performed by a qualified technician.
Keep manufacturer safeguards active during diagnosis and review.
promotionNotes: Replace placeholder manual metadata before ApprovedForCatalog.
Copy to production JSON only through normal PR review after validator approval.
